title: KingD3fault's [Fan Made]
body:
![Title Image for KingD3fault's pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Fo79jqAa/images/ec5b57299ae1d96aa1252ec679b384a055906f82.gif)
## A FANMADE texturepack for the CPvPer and Youtuber, KingD3fault.

**NOIT AN OFFCIAL KINGD3FAULT PACK!**
Comes with
1. Low Fire
2. Small Totem
3. Reduced Particles
4. End Crystal Revamp
5. Better Netherite
6. Custom GUI
7. Custom Item Animations

And More!
